name: Let's build a garden
short_description: Let's build a garden 2 A sandbox to forget time, creating a breathing garden
detailed_description:
Let's build a garden 2

Freedom shapes all things, from then on

Boundless map definition: From exquisite courtyards to thousand acre gardens, the size of the map is up to you to decide. Generate a dense forest in 10 seconds, where every blade of grass and every tree can be adjusted in proportion to create a unique micro landscape or grand scene

3000+Fine Model Library: From classical pavilions to modern furniture, a massive collection of models satisfies all the imaginations of gardens. Free stacking of mountains and digging of lakes, terrain editor allows the earth to listen to your every creativity

Real time changes are flexible: after the completion of the building, the door and window styles can still be adjusted and the material colors can be changed at any time. Inspiration comes without the need to start over, making the creative process as smooth and natural as thinking

🌦️ Experience the dynamic ecology of breathing

Deep weather system: Not only rain, snow, cloudy and sunny, but also delicate morning fog, gentle evening breeze, and dazzling aurora. Every weather change brings a different visual feast, making the garden always full of freshness

Vibrant details: Flowers and plants grow on the surface of objects, birds fly across the sky, and fish swim and play in the water. Let your garden truly come to life, full of vitality

🎵 Multi sensory immersive experience

Personalized soundscape customization: The built-in music player supports local songs, paired with sound effects such as gurgling water, bird calls, and insect sounds, creating an exclusive immersive soundscape that makes people feel like they are in it

Movie level light and shadow effects: from sunset to moonlight, freely arranged light sources set a unique tone for your world

Provide first person, third person, and aerial perspectives to allow you to explore your work from all angles.

Disadvantages: 1. Due to its realistic nature, it consumes a lot of computer resources, especially when running with high image quality. You can lower the image quality during construction.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Russian, Turkish, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
